ItacPersonItem.Notes: Marcello Ramignani became a member of the Oziosi academy in Naples in December 1613. See Girolamo Nicolino, Historia della Citta di Chieti, Napoli, Honofrio Savio, 1657 (BL Shelfmark: 10131.c.9.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
